channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-1407] Wrong error messages on MDS and Client during a POSIX-validated meta-data operations/situation
item.description:
Here is the reproducer/scenario and error messages on the Client side :
=======================================================================
[root@lascaux3438 ~] # dmesg | grep Lustre | tail -10
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:10:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:15:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:20:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:25:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:30:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:35:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:40:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:45:02 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:50:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:55:01 2012
[root@lascaux3438 ~] # cd /ptmp
[root@lascaux3438 ptmp] # mkdir foo
[root@lascaux3438 ptmp] # cd foo
[root@lascaux3438 foo] # df .
Filesystem 1K-blocks Used Available Use% Mounted on
lascaux110-ib0@o2ib10,lascaux110-ib1@o2ib11:lascaux111-ib0@o2ib10,lascaux111-ib1@o2ib11:/ptmp2
1693133933568 200910090740 1475222769688 12% /ptmp
[root@lascaux3438 foo] #
[root@lascaux3438 foo] # stat .
File: `.'
Size: 4096 Blocks: 8 IO Block: 4096 directory
Device: ca6be868h/3396069480d Inode: 144115281692763756 Links: 2
Access: (0755/drwxr-xr-x) Uid: ( 0/ root) Gid: ( 0/ root)
Access: 2012-04-27 16:58:23.000000000 +0200
Modify: 2012-04-27 16:58:23.000000000 +0200
Change: 2012-04-27 16:58:23.000000000 +0200
[root@lascaux3438 foo] # dmesg | grep Lustre | tail -10
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:10:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:15:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:20:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:25:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:30:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:35:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:40:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:45:02 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:50:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:55:01 2012
[root@lascaux3438 foo] # rm -rf /ptmp/foo
[root@lascaux3438 foo] # stat .
stat: cannot stat `.': No such file or directory
[root@lascaux3438 foo] # dmesg | grep Lustre | tail -10
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:40:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:45:02 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:50:01 2012
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Fri Apr 27 16:55:01 2012
LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with JO.BOB.WL.IL@o2ib11. The mds_getattr operation failed with -2
LustreError: Skipped 605 previous similar messages
LustreError: 61537:0:(file.c:2111:ll_inode_revalidate_fini()) failure -2 inode 144115281692763756
LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with JO.BOB.WL.IL@o2ib11. The mds_getattr operation failed with -2
LustreError: 61544:0:(file.c:2111:ll_inode_revalidate_fini()) failure -2 inode 144115281692763756
LustreError: Skipped 1 previous similar message
[root@lascaux3438 foo] #
=======================================================================

when the error msgs on the Server side are multiple "(ldlm_lib.c:2123:target_send_reply_msg()) @@@ processing error (-2) ..." ones.

These error msgs should be avoided for log cleanup/clarification and at least be changed of message category to be only enabled at a high level of debugging.
item.environment: Occurs in both Lustre 2.0 and 2.1 with very small differences in messages.
item.summary: Wrong error messages on MDS and Client during a POSIX-validated meta-data operations/situation

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Patch submit to: http://review.whamcloud.com/3076
Hi, Bruno, Do you think this messages shouldn't be print out or just don't too noisy.

Yangsheng

Could you please look into this one?

Thanks

Peter
Oops, forgot to indicate that the "mkdir/cd/rmdir" sequence is valid and often used in T100 site/customer jobs.
